city.label: Ville
city.description: City where the property is located
city.normalization_rules: lowercase, strip accents, map aliases (Dla->Douala, Yde->Yaounde)

transaction.label: Transaction
transaction.description: Type of real estate transaction (rent, buy, sell, finance, find)
transaction.validation_rules: RENT, BUY, SELL, FINANCE, FIND, SERVICE
transaction.question_template: C'est pour louer, acheter, vendre ou investir ?

property_type.label: Type de bien
property_type.description: The specific property type the user is looking for
property_type.validation_rules: 18 residential types, 7 land types, 16 commercial types

intent.label: Intention
intent.description: The specific user intention behind the transaction
intent.validation_rules: RENT_PROPERTY, BUY_PROPERTY, SELL_PROPERTY, INVESTOR_INTENT, FIND_PROFESSIONAL, GET_SERVICE
intent.normalization_rules: Map to canonical intents from user language

neighborhood.label: Quartier
neighborhood.description: Target neighborhood or district for the property search
neighborhood.validation_rules: Must be in neighborhood list for the city

budget_max.label: Budget maximum
budget_max.description: Maximum budget the user is willing to spend
budget_max.normalization_rules: Normalize to monthly for rent, total for buy

budget_type.label: Type de budget
budget_type.description: What the budget figure represents (monthly, total, per night, per sqm)

budget_currency.label: Devise
budget_currency.normalization_rules: Normalize to XAF for Cameroon operations

budget_negotiable.label: Négociable
budget_negotiable.normalization_rules: Default true for rent, false for buy

charges.label: Charges
charges.description: Whether utilities are included in the rent

financing.label: Financement
financing.description: How the user plans to finance the purchase

disponibilite.label: Disponibilite
disponibilite.description: When the user wants to move in or start
disponibilite.validation_rules: Must be future date or relative

delai.label: Delai
delai.description: General time horizon for the search

meuble.label: Meuble
meuble.normalization_rules: Derived from property type for some types

surface.label: Surface habitable
surface.description: Usable living area in square meters

etage.label: Etage
etage.validation_rules: REZ_DE_CHAUSSEE, BAS, MILIEU, HAUT, TOIT_TERRASSE, INDIFFERENT

piscine.label: Piscine
piscine.description: Whether a swimming pool is desired

telephone.label: Telephone
telephone.question_template: Quel est votre numero de telephone ?

usage_prevu.label: Usage prevu
usage_prevu.description: Intended use for the land or property

num_titre.label: Numero titre
num_titre.question_template: Quel est le numero du titre foncier ?

litiges_connus.label: Litiges connus
litiges_connus.description: Whether there are known legal disputes

accessibilite_route.label: Accessibilite route
accessibilite_route.description: Quality of road access to the land

proximity_preferences.label: Proximite
proximity_preferences.description: What the user needs to be near (schools, markets, transport)
proximity_preferences.normalization_rules: Extract key locations; geocode if possible
proximity_preferences.question_template: Avez-vous besoin d'etre proche de quelque chose ?

mobility.label: Mobilite
mobility.description: How flexible the user is about location
mobility.normalization_rules: Derived from user language about location

usage.label: Usage
usage.description: Intended use of the property (residence or investment)
usage.question_template: Ce sera pour y habiter, investir ou les deux ?

nombre_personnes.label: Nombre de personnes
nombre_personnes.description: How many people will occupy the property

forage.label: Forage
forage.description: Whether a water well is needed or available

nombre_colocataires.label: Nombre colocataires
nombre_colocataires.description: Number of people in a colocation

genre_preference.label: Preference genre
genre_preference.question_template: Preference de genre pour la colocation ?

activite_prevue.label: Activite prevue
activite_prevue.description: Type of business planned for the location

surface_min.label: Surface minimale
surface_min.description: Minimum required floor area in m2

visibilite_route.label: Visibilite route
visibilite_route.description: Whether the location is visible from the road

fonds_commerce.label: Fonds commerce
fonds_commerce.description: Whether the business goodwill is included

objet_financement.label: Objet financement
objet_financement.validation_rules: ACHAT, CONSTRUCTION, RENOVATION, PROMOTION, FONDS_ROULEMENT, EQUIPEMENT, REFINANCEMENT, INVESTISSEMENT
objet_financement.question_template: Quel est l'objet de votre demande ?

montant_recherche.label: Montant recherche
montant_recherche.normalization_rules: Must be less than or equal to cost

apport_disponible.label: Apport disponible
apport_disponible.description: Available down payment or equity contribution

profil_demandeur.label: Profil demandeur
profil_demandeur.validation_rules: SALARIE, INDEPENDANT, ENTREPRISE, INVESTISSEUR, DIASPORA, PROMOTEUR

garanties_disponibles.label: Garanties disponibles
garanties_disponibles.validation_rules: TITRE_FONCIER, HYPOTHEQUE, CAUTION, NANTISSEMENT, CAUTION_SOLIDAIRE, ASSURANCE, DEPOT_GARANTIE, PAS_DE_GARANTIE

cout_total_projet.label: Cout total projet
cout_total_projet.question_template: Quel est le cout total du projet ?

terrain_loti.label: Terrain loti
terrain_loti.description: Whether land is serviced with roads and utilities

terrain_constructible.label: Terrain constructible
terrain_constructible.description: Whether the land is zoned for construction

inondable.label: Zone inondable
inondable.description: Whether land is in a flood-prone area
inondable.question_template: Le terrain est-il en zone inondable ?

hypotheque.label: Hypotheque
hypotheque.description: Whether there is a mortgage or charge on the property

servitudes.label: Servitudes
servitudes.description: Existing easements or rights of way

coordonnees_gps.label: Coordonnees GPS
coordonnees_gps.description: Exact GPS coordinates of a property
